sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Mai-ah Job in A Thu Gen Nuam

verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
“Tu laitakin Pasian' tungah a phunlo, a hehloin ka om thei kei a, thumloin ka om thei kei hi
Amah ka zon' dan ding thei-in, ama kiang ka tun'na ding zia a thei hi leng
a mai-ah ka thu ka gen ding a, kei ka dikna thu a kicingin ka gen ding hi
Ama hong gen ding thute leh kei a hong dawn'na ding thute ka thei nuam hi
Pasian in a thaneih khempeuh tawh keima langkhatah hong pang ding ahi hiam? Hong langpan'lo ding a, ka thugen hong ngai ding hi
Kei a thuman ka hi a, Pasian kiangah ka gen ding hi. Kuama phelzawh nawnloh dingin kei' dikna a genkhia ding hi
“Ahi zongin Nisuahna lam ka zong a, Pasian ka mu kei hi. Nitumna lam ka zong a, amah ka mu thei tuan kei hi
Leilu lam ka zon' hangin amah ka mu thei kei a, Leitaw lam ka zon' hangin zong amah ka mu thei tuan kei hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in ka kalsuanna khempeuh thei a, kei hong ze-et leh ka sian'thona a mu ding hi
Ama hong lamlahna citakin ka zui cinten a, lam ka pial ngei kei hi
Pasian' thupiakna bangin ka gamta ngitnget a, keima utna zuiloin ama deihna ka zui hi
“Amah kikheel ngeilo a, kuamah in amah nial zolo hi. Ama hih nopte kuamah in khaktan zolo hi
Tua ahih manin kei-a' dingin a geelsate tungsak ding hi. Amah in hih bangin geelna tampi tak a nei ahi hi
Tua hi a, ama omna-ah kei ka lau mahmah a, ka ngaihsut khak ciangin amah ka kihta hi
Vanglian Pasian in ka lungsim han'na hong mangsak hi
Khuamial in ka mit a mialsak hangin keima kihtak pen khuamial hilo a, Pasian ahi hi.
